home.storyHeading: Augusto is a sunlit room on Rua de Belém. Slow brunches, careful coffee, and a kitchen that treats every plate as a small, generous gesture.
home.storyBody: Augusto started as a small idea between friends. A corner of Belém where the coffee is taken seriously, the eggs come from a farm we trust, and the avocado is always perfectly ripe. Four years on, it's still the same long table, the same playlist, and the same morning light pouring through the arches.
home.horizontalHeading: A short menu, served with intention.
home.spaceHeading: Tiles, oak, and a long arched window.
home.spaceBody: We renovated a forgotten corner of Belém into a quiet, Mediterranean room. Plaster walls, fluted counters, terracotta floors and a long communal table where strangers become regulars.
home.footerHeadline: Slow mornings, sunlit rooms, considered plates.

menuPage.h1: A short menu, written every season.
menuPage.intro: We cook with what is grown nearby and roast our coffee a few streets over. The menu is short on purpose. A small selection, made carefully, served warmly.
menuPage.askNote: Dietary needs, allergies, or a quiet table for two,

story.h1: A small family, a sunlit room, and the slow start of a neighbourhood.
story.chapterOneA: In 2021 we found an empty corner shop on Rua de Belém. Cracked tile, a forgotten back garden, and a single tall window that filled the room with afternoon light.
story.chapterOneB: We saved the tiles. Plastered the walls a soft cream. Built a long oak counter with a fluted base, and laid a terracotta floor that warms in the morning sun. The room rebuilt itself almost. We simply kept what was already beautiful.
story.chapterTwoA: Augusto is family in the small sense. Five people who learned to cook from grandmothers, who roast their own coffee in a garage two streets over, and who tend a tiny garden of herbs out back.
story.chapterTwoB: We hire slowly. We stay open daily. We keep the menu short so the cooking can stay generous.
story.chapterThreeA: We buy from three farms in the Tagus valley, bake bread daily and make our own jam in summer. Our coffee is roasted on Tuesdays. The eggs come from a family in Sintra who name their hens.
story.quote: We wanted a place where breakfast lasts as long as the coffee, and the coffee lasts as long as the conversation.

visit.h1: Come sit. The kettle is already warm.
visit.momentsHeading: Three quiet windows in the day.

moments.morningsDesc: Quiet from 10 to 11. Best for a long table and a slow flat white.
moments.brunchDesc: Busiest from 12 to 14, especially on weekends. Walk ins welcome.
moments.afternoonsDesc: After 15:00 the room thins out. Pastel de nata, filter coffee, slow conversation.

visit.findBody: A short walk from Mosteiro dos Jerónimos. Tram 15 stops at the corner.

reserve.intro: Walk ins are always welcome. Reserving just helps us keep the kitchen calm and the long table ready for you. No deposit, no card.
reserve.smallerGroupsBody: Two to four people. We'll always find a corner.
reserve.largerTablesBody: Five or more. Please reserve so we can prepare the long table at the back.
reserve.cancellationBody: If your plans change, just reply to your confirmation email. A friendly heads up keeps the kitchen happy.
reserve.fallback: Live availability isn't connected yet. Send us your details and we'll write back the same day.
reserve.fullyBooked: Fully booked this day. Try another?
reserve.closedNotice: We're closed this day ({reason}). Pick another and we'll save you a sunlit corner.
reserve.name: Your name
reserve.notesPlaceholder: Birthday brunch, lactose free, quiet corner…
reserve.policyNote: We hold the table for 15 minutes past your time. If you'll be later, just reply to your confirmation and we'll do our best.
reserve.errorGeneric: Something went wrong. Please try again.

reserveSimple.name: Your name
reserveSimple.thanksHeading: Your email is on its way.
reserveSimple.thanksBody: We've opened your mail app with the request already written. Please send it and we'll write back the same day. If nothing opened, drop us a line at

confirmed.emailSent: A confirmation is on its way to {email}. The kitchen's already excited.
confirmed.fallback: Your table is held. A confirmation should arrive in your inbox shortly. If not, email
